meta.title: Limit wait action to 10 seconds
meta.body_summary: Cap browser-use agent wait action at 10 seconds to prevent excessively long asyncio.sleep delays during automation.

few_shot_labels.notes: 小范围 wait 上限修复；cubic 指出负值 sleep 风险后于 follow-up commit 采纳 min(max(seconds,0),10)；无 benchmark 但 CI agent 任务评测 2/3 通过即合并。

change_scale_vs_library.interpretation: 变更规模远低于全库均值/中位数，属于小步快改型 perf PR，与合并成功一致。

RQ2.concern_detail: 行内 review 指出负 seconds 传入 asyncio.sleep 会 ValueError，建议 clamp 下界为 0；作者在 e655986 中实现 min(max(seconds,0),10)。
RQ2.performance_claim: 防止 Agent wait 动作过长导致执行阻塞/延迟累积
RQ2.antipattern_addressed: unbounded_blocking_wait (prior behavior, not in taxonomy enum)

RQ3.boundary_notes: 控制器层参数钳制类改动，无需 benchmark 或底层 runtime 知识；Cursor 在此类小修复上合并阻力低。

detection_detail.code_reading: cubic-dev-ai 静态审阅 wait 实现并给出 clamp 建议
detection_detail.ci_auto: github-actions Agent Task Evaluation 2/3；delve-auditor 安全扫描无问题

RQ4.reproducibility_notes: 无 before/after 耗时数据或 benchmark；仅有 CI 端到端 agent 任务通过率与叙述性 10s 上限说明。
RQ4.regression_detail: review 建议后在同一 PR 内追加 commit 修复负值边界，未出现 revert。

core_change.description: 在 browser_use/controller/service.py 的 wait action 中将 asyncio.sleep(seconds) 改为 actual_seconds=min(max(seconds,0),10)，并更新 action 描述与日志。
core_change.secondary_note: 合并 main 带入多处 observe_debug(ignore_input=True, ignore_output=True) 调整，可能降低 tracing 开销，但非 PR 标题主改动。

patches.patch_excerpt:
@@ -134,12 +134,17 @@ async def go_back(_: NoParamsAction, browser_session: BrowserSession):
 
 		# wait for x seconds
 
-		@self.registry.action('Wait for x seconds default 3')
+		@self.registry.action('Wait for x seconds default 3 (max 10 seconds)')
 		async def wait(seconds: int = 3):
-			msg = f'🕒  Waiting for {seconds} seconds'
+			# Cap wait time at maximum 10 seconds
+			actual_seconds = min(seconds, 10)
+			if actual_seconds != seconds:
+				msg = f'🕒  Waiting for {actual_seconds} seconds (capped from {seconds} seconds, max 10 seconds)'
+			else:
+				msg = f'🕒  Waiting for {actual_seconds} seconds'
 			logger.info(msg)
-			await asyncio.sleep(seconds)
-			return ActionResult(extracted_content=msg, include_in_memory=True, long_term_memory=f'Waited for {seconds} seconds')
+			await asyncio.sleep(actual_seconds)
+			return ActionResult(extracted_content=msg, include_in_memory=True, long_term_memory=f'Waited for {actual_seconds} seconds')
 
 		# Element Interaction Actions

@@ -144,7 +144,9 @@ async def wait(seconds: int = 3):
 				msg = f'🕒  Waiting for {actual_seconds} seconds'
 			logger.info(msg)
 			await asyncio.sleep(actual_seconds)
-			return ActionResult(extracted_content=msg, include_in_memory=True, long_term_memory=f'Waited for {actual_seconds} seconds')
+			return ActionResult(
+				extracted_content=msg, include_in_memory=True, long_term_memory=f'Waited for {actual_seconds} seconds'
+			)
 
 		# Element Interaction Actions

reviews.body_excerpt:
cubic found 1 issue across 1 file. Review it in [cubic.dev](https://cubic.dev/pr/browser-use/browser-use/pull/2437)

<sub>React with 👍 or 👎 to teach cubic. Tag `@cubic-dev-ai` to give specific feedback.</sub>

review_comments.body_excerpt:
<!-- metadata:{"confidence":8,"steps":[]} -->
If a negative value is passed, asyncio.sleep will raise ValueError because sleep length must be non-negative. The code should clamp the lower bound to 0 (or raise an explicit error) before calling sleep.

```suggestion
			actual_seconds = min(max(seconds, 0), 10)
```

commits.author: cursoragent
commits.message:
Cap wait action at maximum 10 seconds

- Updated wait action to limit maximum wait time to 10 seconds
- Added clear logging when wait time is capped
- Updated action description to mention the 10-second limit
- Preserves existing behavior for wait times ≤ 10 seconds
